summary.en: Drybar unbundled blowouts from full-service salons, creating a focused, affordable, experience-led service for customers who wanted styling without cuts or color.
summary.zh: Drybar 把吹发从全服务美发沙龙中拆出来，为只想造型、不想剪染的顾客创造聚焦、可负担、体验化服务。

sources.label: Drybar company history and public interviews
